title: Dispute Avoidance Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger dispute avoidance foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Dispute Avoidance Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Dispute Avoidance Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good dispute avoidance foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Dispute Avoidance Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
